overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Mafia III showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a 1960s New Orleans-inspired city on an overcast day. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets at crosswalks, and passes period-appropriate vehicles and architecture including brick buildings with fire escapes and wooden houses with porches.

character crosses the intersection while a yellow taxi passes in the background

painted white pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
red octagonal stop sign at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a sidewalk near an ornate metal porch, then turns to cross a city street at a crosswalk. A yellow vintage sedan drives through the intersection as the character crosses, with a large brick building featuring fire escapes visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential sidewalk lined with wooden houses featuring porches on the right and parked vintage cars on the left. The character passes a woman with an umbrella walking in the opposite direction, with utility poles and benches visible along the path.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street intersection with a stop sign and enters the crosswalk. A large gray painted mansion dominates the right side of the view while the character crosses, with a blue van and white van visible on the road. The character continues walking past the mansion after crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial-residential corner with restaurant signage

events.description: character approaches a group of pedestrians waiting at the street corner

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk approaching a commercial corner with a distinctive chicken restaurant sign visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the large gray mansion and continues along the sidewalk toward a commercial area. A distinctive rooster restaurant sign becomes visible in the distance, and the character approaches a street corner where pedestrians are waiting. White picket fences line the right side of the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a 1960s city, transitioning from a dense urban intersection into a residential neighborhood and finally toward a commercial district. It begins on a sidewalk by an ornate metal porch, following the character as they cross a street past a yellow vintage sedan and a large brick building with fire escapes. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a residential stretch lined with wooden porches and parked vintage cars, passing a woman with an umbrella under a canopy of utility poles. The camera then tracks the character through another intersection marked by a stop sign, where a large gray painted mansion dominates the view alongside a blue and white van. Finally, the path leads past the mansion and along white picket fences, opening up toward a commercial area where a distinctive rooster restaurant sign appears in the distance.
